title: Test GLM API Connection with Updated Configuration
job:
Test that the GLM API connection is working correctly with the updated configuration.

Tasks:
1. Verify the environment variables are correctly set (LLM_PROVIDER=custom, LLM_MODEL=glm-5, OPENAI_BASE_URL pointing to z.ai coding endpoint)
2. Make a simple test API call to confirm connectivity
3. Create a brief report at `logs/glm-connection-test.md` documenting success or any errors

Context: User has now set OPENAI_API_KEY secret and should have all required configuration for GLM Coding Plan.
